name: Kenvue Inc.
summary: Kenvue Inc. is a global consumer health company. It operates through three segments: Self Care, comprising over-the-counter medicines and other wellness products; Skin Health and Beauty, including skincare and sun care brands; and Essential Health, which offers products for baby care, oral care, and wound care. Kenvue's portfolio includes well-known brands such as Band-Aid, Neutrogena, Tylenol, and Listerine.
